review: Compare with source-controlled workflow and publish intentionally after review.

workflow.name: RB Calls Context Lookup

parameters.content: ElevenLabs server-tool target for on-demand Notion context. It is scoped from the Call record and only searches pre-approved RB call databases: tax registrations, tax filings, contracts, correspondence, bank accounts, tax payments/prepayments, assets, and call notes. File contents and file URLs are excluded.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: "invalid_request", error: $("Normalize Lookup Request").item.json.validation_error, allowed_categories: $("Normalize Lookup Request").item.json.allowed_categories, instruction: "Use only allowed categories and include call_id." } }}

parameters.content: ElevenLabs server-tool target for on-demand Notion context. It is scoped from the Call record and only searches pre-approved RB call databases: tax registrations, tax filings, contracts, correspondence, bank accounts, tax payments/prepayments, assets, and call notes. File contents and file URLs are excluded.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: "invalid_request", error: $("Normalize Lookup Request").item.json.validation_error, allowed_categories: $("Normalize Lookup Request").item.json.allowed_categories, instruction: "Use only allowed categories and include call_id." } }}

workflow.description: Routes ElevenLabs on-demand call-context lookups through one Switch node, then queries only the pre-approved Notion categories.

workflow.triggerInfo:
This workflow has the following trigger(s):


Webhook trigger(s):


				<trigger 1>
					 - Node name: ElevenLabs Context Lookup Webhook
					 - Base URL: https://eipventures.app.n8n.cloud/
					 - Production path: /webhook/rb-calls-context-lookup
					 - Test path: /webhook-test/rb-calls-context-lookup
					 - HTTP Method: POST
					 - Response Mode: Webhook is configured to respond using "Respond to Webhook" node.
					 - No credentials required for this webhook.
				</trigger 1>
